title: sterigmostemum elichrysifolium subsp. elichrysifolium
intro: Sterigmostemum elichrysifolium subsp. elichrysifolium is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the ginger leaf plant due to its distinctive leaf shape. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sterigmostemum elichrysifolium subsp. elichrysifolium include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat digestive issues, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat respiratory infections and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea infusions and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
